session.user: Run `prettier --write docs/learned/cli/command-organization.md docs/learned/cli/erk-exec-commands.md docs/learned/erk/pr-address-workflows.md` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report them.
session.assistant: I'll run the prettier command to format those files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Format three markdown files with prettier

session.assistant:
prettier passed: All 3 files formatted successfully
The command completed without errors. All three markdown files were formatted: - `docs/learned/cli/command-organization.md` (107ms) - `docs/learned/cli/erk-exec-commands.md` (52ms) - `docs/learned/erk/pr-address-workflows.md` (62ms)
